posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — If you enable on kite volumes will grow !

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — Hi @Ravi_Shankar , volumes are still very low. Yesterday, only 2 EGR trades happened with total quantity of 3. You can check this here . We are tracking liquidity closely before enabling it on Kite.

posts.author: Ravi_Shankar
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — Any dates to launch in Kite @nithin_kumrr

posts.author: Sachin_Thakur1
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — while we wait for EGR to have a certain level of liquidity, a client who wants to buy EGR may not wait for us to introduce it and open account with some other broker, if adding this product is on our agenda we better add it as soon as possible

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — Hi @Sachin_Thakur1 , when volumes are low, spreads are wide and you end up getting bad prices on your orders. So, waiting for liquidity to pick up before we enable it is best for clients.

posts.author: Sachin_Thakur1
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — why liquidity is the criteria to add a good product to our services portfolio?

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — Can’t comment on timelines yet. Also, this depends on how liquidity picks up.

posts.author: Abhiroop_B
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — Are there any tentative dates by when we can trade them on Kite?

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — These are not on any approved collateral list yet. As mentioned, they were just launched. The CC will need to approve first, and later we can get other details like haircut, etc. No, EGR is not like SGB. SGBs were issued by RBI based on prevailing gold rates at the time. They often trade at a discount due to low liquidity in secondary market. EGR is backed by real physical gold sitting in a vault and the price is determined by demand and supply on the exchange. The price will stay close to global gold prices ly. They will trade like stoc…

posts.author: siva0
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — pls I have more doubts regarding the same . can we use them as collateral and what will be the haircut EGR will be trade price is same like SGB or we will peg it to international gold prices ? so these will act like individual stocks or Mutual funds ?

posts.author: nithin_kumrr
posts.text: Electronic gold receitps EGR still not visible in kite — Hi @siva0 , EGR is a new segment on NSE, launched on 4th May 2026. We need to onboard to the segment, and volumes need to pick up before we can enable it on Kite. We will make an announcement when we are ready. Here’s everything you should know about EGRs: support.zerodha.com What are Electronic Gold Receipts (EGRs)? What are Electronic Gold Receipts (EGRs)? You can also check the NSE EGR page directly for this: NSE India Electronic Gold Receipts NSE India (National Stock Exchange) - LIVE stock/share market updates from one of the leadin…
